i: MAATE (Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transición Ecológica) — Ecuador's environment ministry. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman. Ecuador's 2008 Constitution (Articles 71-74) grants legally enforceable rights to nature (Pachamama), a global first.

EP PetroEcuador — the state oil company. PetroAmazonas EP — manages upstream operations in the Amazon basin. The Lago Agrio case (Chevron/Texaco) — one of the world's largest بيئي lawsuits over oil contamination in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) — the energy and natural resources regulatory agency.

Asamblea Nacional del Ecuador — unicameral parliament (137 members). Contact through asambleanacional.gob.ec. Ecuador's rights of nature framework (2008 Constitution) and the 2023 Yasuní referendum are globally significant legal precedents for بيئي governance.

EE.s: Advanced digital اقتصاد ($43.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with unique oil shale dependence (0.96% oil rents from kukersite extraction). Services-dominant (65.7% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). EU and NATO member. World leader in e-governance. Oil shale power generation is Estonia's largest source of CO₂ انبعاثات.

sectors.w: Estonia's oil shale sector is concentrated in Ida-Viru county (Eesti Energia/Enefit). EU ETS carbon costs make oil shale electricity the most expensive fossil option. عندما carbon pricing fully applies, the المصلحة المتداخلة between shale operators and electricity consumers breaks.
bp: Full EU ETS alignment without compensation. Oil shale electricity already costs more than wind in the Baltic. عندما subsidies and free allowances are eliminated, المصلحة المتداخلة في oil shale generation breaks — renewables are cheaper.
Mandatory لكل محطة lifecycle انبعاثات and health-impact disclosure for oil shale processing. Estonia's detailed بيئي monitoring makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. Oil shale processing releases CO₂, particulate matter, and phenolic wastewater by physical and chemical process.

i: Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board) — Estonia's بيئي enforcement and permitting authority. Keskkonnaministeerium (Ministry of the Environment) — oversees بيئي policy. Estonia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Eesti Energia (Enefit) — the مملوكة للدولة energy company and dominant oil shale operator. Enefit operates the Narva power plants (the largest oil shale power plants in the world) and oil shale processing facilities.
Konkurentsiamet (Competition Authority) — also serves as Estonia's منظم الطاقة. Ida-Viru county hosts ~90% of Estonia's oil shale operations and faces significant economic transition challenges.

Riigikogu — Estonia's unicameral parliament (101 members). Contact through riigikogu.ee. Estonia's Climate Ambition target includes significant انبعاثات reduction from the energy sector. EU Just Transition Fund — Estonia receives JTF funding for Ida-Viru transition.

EG.s: Largest Arab اقتصاد by population ($389.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Oil and gas rents at 5.04%. Major gas producer (Zohr field, Mediterranean). الزراعة عند 13.7% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. High military expenditure. Hosted COP27. Suez Canal provides strategic global trade leverage.

sectors.w: Egypt's Zohr gas field (discovered 2015) transformed Egypt from gas importer to exporter. COP27 presidency created domestic pressure for انبعاثات الشفافية. Per-field انبعاثات disclosure makes W computable.
bp: Redirect gas export revenue to solar energy development. Egypt's solar irradiance is among the world's highest. عندما solar electricity undercuts gas-fired generation domestically, المصلحة المتداخلة في gas-for-domestic-power يضعف.

تنفيذ لكل حقل انبعاثات disclosure for Zohr and other major fields. Egypt's COP27 commitments create institutional pressure — making lifecycle انبعاثات visible per unit of production makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

i: EEAA (Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency) — Egypt's بيئي regulatory body. EGPC (Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil and gas company. EGAS (Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company) — manages natural gas operations. Note: Egypt has severe restrictions on المجتمع المدني and press freedom. Whistleblower protections are minimal.
Eni — operates Zohr, the largest gas field in the Mediterranean. BP — major operator in the West Nile Delta. EGPC and EGAS manage state interests in all petroleum operations.

Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources — oversees hydrocarbons policy. NREA (New and Renewable Energy Authority) — responsible for الطاقة المتجددة development. Egypt's Integrated Sustainable Energy Strategy targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035.

Note: Egypt under President el-Sisi is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The House of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 596 members) does not function as an independent democratic institution. International channels: Arab League, African Union (Egypt hosted AU in 2019), Union for the Mediterranean, COP27 legacy initiatives.

ET.s: Africa's second-most-populous country ($149.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Agriculture dominates (34.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, primarily coffee, teff, livestock). Rapid industrialization drive (industrial parks). Major hydropower (GERD — Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam). Post-civil war recovery.

sectors.w: Ethiopia's agricultural expansion is the primary driver of إزالة الغابات (fr=5.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي equivalent in forest rents). عندما per-farm بيئي data (tree cover, soil carbon) is linked to agricultural output, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Scale Ethiopia's Productive Safety Net Program (PSNP) to include بيئي conditionality. عندما agricultural support payments require soil conservation and tree planting, المصلحة المتداخلة في clearing forest for short-term cultivation يضعف.
Satellite-based monitoring of forest cover and تدهور التربة published at woreda level. Ethiopia's Green Legacy Initiative provides political commitment — mandatory monitoring data makes W computable.

قابل للكسر جزئياً. Subsistence agriculture on degraded land inherently affects soil and water systems. However, Ethiopia's traditional conservation agriculture (terracing, agroforestry) can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: Regional بيئي protection authorities — Ethiopia's federal system devolves بيئي management to regional states. EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission) — the national human rights institution. تطويرment Agents (DAs) — government agricultural extension workers deployed at kebele (ward) level throughout rural Ethiopia.

ECX (Ethiopian Commodity Exchange) — the commodities trading platform for coffee, sesame, and other agricultural products. Ethiopia is Africa's largest coffee producer and coffee is the country's largest export. Industrial parks development corporation — manages Ethiopia's growing manufacturing sector.

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy and the PSNP. EFCCC (Environment, Forest and Climate Change Commission) — Ethiopia's الهيئة البيئية. Green Legacy Initiative — the government's flagship reforestation program targeting 20 billion seedlings.

Note: Ethiopia is a federal برلماني republic but democratic governance has been constrained by civil conflict (Tigray war 2020-2022). The House of Peoples' Representatives (547 members) is the lower house. International channels: African Union (HQ in Addis Ababa), Nile Basin Initiative, IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on تطويرment), AFR100 (Africa's contribution to the Bonn Challenge on forest restoration).

FI.s: Advanced Nordic اقتصاد ($298.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with strong forestry sector. الخدمات عند 62.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, manufacturing at 14.2%. High healthcare expenditure (10.47% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Major pulp and paper producers (UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group). عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي with robust بيئي regulation.

sectors.w: Finland's forestry-driven monoculture (pine/spruce plantations replacing natural forests) reduces biodiversity and degrades peatland carbon stocks. عندما per-harvest biodiversity and carbon data is published alongside timber revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: إصلاح EU CAP and national forestry subsidies to reward biodiversity and carbon storage rather than timber volume. عندما subsidies incentivize continuous-cover forestry over clear-cutting, المصلحة المتداخلة في plantation monoculture يضعف.

Mandatory per-harvest بيئي data (biodiversity indicators, soil carbon, water quality). Finland's Metsähallitus (state forest enterprise) already collects extensive data — making it publicly accessible makes W computable.

قابل للكسر جزئياً. Timber plantation inherently reduces biodiversity compared to natural forest. However, continuous-cover forestry and extended rotation lengths can significantly reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: ELY-keskus — regional authorities responsible for بيئي monitoring and enforcement. SYKE (Suomen ympäristökeskus / Finnish Environment Institute) — the national بيئي research and monitoring institute. Ilmoittajansuojelulaki (Whistleblower Protection Act, 2023) — Finnish transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

UPM-Kymmene — one of Finland's largest forestry companies. Stora Enso — Finnish-Swedish forestry and paper company. Metsä Group — cooperative of 100,000+ Finnish forest owners. Metsähallitus — state enterprise managing one-third of Finland's land area.

MMM (Maa- ja metsätalousministeriö) — the ministry responsible for agriculture and forestry policy. National Forest Strategy 2025 — Finland's strategic framework for forestry sector development. EU Nature Restoration Law — requires restoration of degraded ecosystems including forests.

Eduskunta (Parliament of Finland) — unicameral legislature with 200 members. Contact through eduskunta.fi. The Maa- ja metsätalousvaliokunta (Agriculture and Forestry Committee) handles forestry legislation. Finland's climate law targets carbon neutrality by 2035.

GA.s: Oil-dependent Central African اقتصاد ($20.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 15.83% combined oil and gas rents. 88% forest cover — one of the world's most forested countries. Low population (2.4M). Military coup August 2023 ended the Bongo family's 55-year rule.

sectors.w: Gabon's oil production is in terminal decline from mature fields (peaked at ~370,000 bpd in 1997, now ~200,000). As production falls, the المصلحة المتداخلة between operators and government revenue يضعف. Gabon's forests offer alternative revenue through carbon credits.
bp: Monetize Gabon's forest carbon stocks through REDD+ and voluntary carbon markets. Gabon received $17M from Norway for forest protection in 2021 — scaling this replaces declining oil revenue and breaks المصلحة المتداخلة في extraction.
تنفيذ لكل حقل انبعاثات disclosure for all operators (TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala Energy). Making بيئي costs visible makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: ANPN (Agence Nationale des Parcs Nationaux) — manages Gabon's 13 national parks (covering 11% of territory). GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company. EITI Gabon — member since 2004. Note: Gabon is under military transition government since August 2023 coup.
TotalEnergies — the largest oil producer in Gabon. Perenco, Assala Energy — other major operators. GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company.
Ministry of Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas policy. DGEPN (Direction Générale de l'Environnement et de la Protection de la Nature) — بيئي directorate.

Note: Gabon is under military transition government (Comité pour la Transition et la Restauration des Institutions, CTRI) since August 2023. Democratic institutions are suspended. International channels: CEMAC, CAFI, African Union, OPEC membership. Gabon's 2021 deal with Norway's sovereign wealth fund for forest protection is a model for forest-state climate finance.

GE.s: Small South Caucasus اقتصاد ($34.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with التعدين sector (1.28% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, primarily manganese and copper). Services-dominant (62% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country (2023). Significant hydropower potential. Political tensions between pro-EU and pro-Russia orientations.

sectors.w: Georgia's manganese التعدين (Chiatura) and copper التعدين generate significant water pollution. EU accession بيئي alignment will require improved monitoring. عندما water quality data is linked to التعدين output, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EU accession بيئي alignment. عندما Georgia must meet EU بيئي standards for التعدين, المصلحة المتداخلة في low-cost extraction without بيئي controls يضعف.
Mandatory لكل منجم water quality and انبعاثات disclosure. Georgia's National Environmental Agency collects some data — extending to public disclosure makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining disturbs landscapes, but improved tailings management can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: NEA (National Environmental Agency) — responsible for بيئي monitoring, permitting, and enforcement. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Agriculture — oversees بيئي and agricultural policy. Georgia's Law on Freedom of Speech and Expression provides some protections for reporting.

Georgian Manganese — subsidiary of ERG (Eurasian Resources Group), operating the Chiatura manganese mines. RMG Copper — operates copper mines. Georgia's التعدين sector is primarily controlled by international investors.
National Agency of Mines — responsible for التعدين licensing and oversight. Georgia's EU Association Agreement (2014) includes provisions for بيئي alignment.

Sakartvelos Parlamenti (Parliament of Georgia) — unicameral legislature with 150 members. Contact through parliament.ge. Georgia is an مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country (2023) and aspirant to full عضو الاتحاد الأوروبيship. EU Association Agreement — includes Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA) with بيئي provisions.

GH.s: West African اقتصاد ($82.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with significant oil (4.06% rents), gold التعدين (5.17% mineral rents), and cocoa agriculture (20.9% ag share). One of Africa's most stable democracies. Debt crisis (2022 IMF bailout). Illegal artisanal gold التعدين (galamsey) is a major بيئي crisis.

sectors.w: Ghana's galamsey (illegal artisanal التعدين) crisis has contaminated water bodies across cocoa-growing regions. عندما لكل منجم water quality data is published and linked to gold production, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب. The galamsey problem is so severe that it threatens Ghana's water supply.
bp: Formalize artisanal التعدين with بيئي standards and alternative livelihood programs. عندما legal small-scale التعدين provides comparable income with less بيئي damage, المصلحة المتداخلة في illegal extraction يضعف.
Satellite-based water quality monitoring linked to التعدين areas. Ghana's Water Resources Commission already monitors water quality — extending to real-time public data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining disturbs landscapes. However, formalized artisanal التعدين with mercury-free processing (e.g., gravity separation) can significantly reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: IMCIM (Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining) — established to coordinate government response to the galamsey crisis. WRC (Water Resources Commission) — manages Ghana's water resources and monitors water quality. Minerals Commission — the regulatory body for the التعدين sector, responsible for licensing and compliance monitoring.

Gold Fields — operates Tarkwa and Damang mines. Newmont — operates Ahafo and Akyem mines. AngloGold Ashanti — major gold التعدين company with Ghanaian operations. Ghana is Africa's largest gold producer.

EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Ghana) — responsible for بيئي permitting, monitoring, and enforcement. Forestry Commission — manages Ghana's forest reserves, many of which are threatened by illegal التعدين. EITI Ghana — Ghana has been EITI compliant since 2010.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential ديمقراطية with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold التعدين.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African اقتصاد ($25B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). الزراعة عند 31% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite التعدين displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making لكل منجم بيئي data visible breaks system independence.
bp: International supply chain due diligence (EU CSDDD) requiring بيئي and human rights compliance for bauxite. عندما buyers must verify mine-level conditions, المصلحة المتداخلة في low-cost, unregulated extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. عندما downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Open-pit bauxite التعدين inherently disturbs landscapes. However, progressive rehabilitation and dust suppression can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: Note: Guinea is under military rule (CNRD — Comité National du Rassemblement et du Développement) since September 2021. Independent المجتمع المدني operates under severe constraints. Bureau Guinéen des Études et Évaluations Environnementales (BGEEE) — بيئي assessment authority. International monitoring: Human Rights Watch and Inclusive تطويرment International have documented impacts of bauxite التعدين on Guinean communities.

CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée) — JV of Alcoa, Rio Tinto, and Dadco, one of the world's largest bauxite producers. SMB (Société Minière de Boké) — Chinese-backed consortium (includes Winning International, Shandong Weiqiao). GAC (Guinea Alumina Corporation) — Emirates Global Aluminium subsidiary. ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) — the industry sustainability standard for the aluminum value chain.

Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie — oversees التعدين policy and licensing. Code Minier (2011, revised 2013) — Guinea's التعدين code establishing بيئي obligations. EITI Guinea — Guinea has been EITI compliant, publishing reports on التعدين revenues.

Note: Guinea's democratic institutions are suspended under military rule. The Conseil National de la Transition (CNT) serves as a transitional legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Guinea suspended), African Union, international التعدين company home-country oversight (UK, Canada, UAE, China). EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD) — will require EU companies to address human rights and بيئي impacts in their supply chains.

GQ.s: Small petrostate ($12.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 21.57% combined oil and gas rents. One of Africa's highest per-capita الناتج المحلي الإجماليs but extreme inequality. Authoritarian rule (Obiang family since 1979 — world's longest-serving head of state). Oil production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Equatorial Guinea's oil production has declined ~75% from peak. As fields deplete, the المصلحة المتداخلة between operators and government revenue يضعف. Without new discoveries, the economic case for diversification becomes unavoidable.
bp: Economic diversification as oil depletes. عندما production revenue falls below government operating costs, المصلحة المتداخلة في continued extraction from depleting fields breaks — alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-field انبعاثات disclosure through international operator reporting (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil). Making بيئي costs visible makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: Note: Equatorial Guinea is one of the world's most سلطوي states. No independent media, المجتمع المدني, or labor organizations exist. EG LNG (Equatorial Guinea LNG Holdings) — operates the LNG processing plant. International engagement: US Department of Justice Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Initiative has investigated Obiang family assets. Transparency International consistently ranks Equatorial Guinea among the most corrupt countries.
ExxonMobil — the largest oil operator in Equatorial Guinea. Marathon Oil — operates in offshore blocks. GEPetrol — the state national oil company.

Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas operations. Note: Equatorial Guinea was suspended from EITI in 2010 for insufficient progress on الشفافية. BEAC (central bank of CEMAC zone) provides limited macroeconomic oversight.

Note: Equatorial Guinea under President Obiang (in power since 1979) has no democratic institutions. The Cámara de Representantes del Pueblo and Senate are rubber-stamp bodies. International channels: CEMAC, African Union, UN Human Rights Council. Several countries (US, France, Switzerland) have pursued legal action against Obiang family members for corruption and money laundering.

GR.s: EU اقتصاد ($256.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with dominant services sector (68% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). الزراعة عند 3.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (olives, wine).

sectors.w: Greece's Mediterranean diet is being displaced by UPF consumption, contributing to rising obesity (Greece has one of Europe's highest childhood obesity rates). عندما diet-related healthcare costs are published per product category through EOPYY health insurance data, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: تنفيذ front-of-pack health labelling to make welfare costs visible to consumers. عندما UPF health costs are visible at point of sale, the المصلحة المتداخلة between processors and retailers in high-margin UPF يضعف.

EOPYY (National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) publication of diet-attributable disease costs per food category. Greece's national health system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. إصلاحulation mandates can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a برلماني ديمقراطية and عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي.

GT.s: Central American اقتصاد ($113.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with agriculture at 9.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of الناتج المحلي الإجمالي).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives إزالة الغابات and displaces indigenous communities. عندما per-farm إزالة الغابات data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. عندما palm oil exports must prove zero-إزالة الغابات origin, المصلحة المتداخلة في clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm بيئي data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with بيئي defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable زيت النخيل) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing اقتصاد globally ($24.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). ريع النفط at 22.08%, التعدين at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). عندما the full fiscal terms and بيئي costs are disclosed and understood, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. عندما Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), المصلحة المتداخلة في an extractive-favorable contract يضعف.
Mandatory لكل حقل انبعاثات disclosure and بيئي monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global انبعاثات — extending to لكل حقل Guyana data makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.

i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for بيئي permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style برلماني ديمقراطية. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. عندما Scope 3 financed انبعاثات are disclosed per financial institution, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed انبعاثات disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. عندما banks must disclose the انبعاثات their lending supports, المصلحة المتداخلة في fossil fuel financing يضعف — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.

Document ESG disclosure violations — report to HKEX listing division
Report through internal bank compliance channels

Set financed انبعاثات reduction targets
Integrate climate risk into lending decisions
HKMA: Mandate climate stress testing for all authorized institutions
SFC: إنفاذ enhanced ESG disclosure for listed companies
HKEX: تعزيز climate-related listing requirements

الضغط من أجل Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) recommendations implementation
Leverage Hong Kong's role as a Belt and Road financing hub to require climate standards
i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income اقتصاد ($37.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with agriculture at 11.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (coffee, palm oil, bananas). التصنيع عند 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives إزالة الغابات in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when إزالة الغابات is linked to specific supply chains, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-إزالة الغابات traceability for palm oil exports. عندما buyers must verify origin, المصلحة المتداخلة في forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based إزالة الغابات monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: Report illegal إزالة الغابات to ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal)
Document land rights violations — report to CONADEH (Comisionado Nacional de los Derechos Humanos)
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms

تنفيذ community benefit-sharing agreements

MiAmbiente+: تعزيز بيئي impact assessment for agricultural expansion

i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for بيئي defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential ديمقراطية. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with dominant services sector (60.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). الزراعة عند 2.9% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: تنفيذ EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. إصلاحulation mandates reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

Report misleading claims to AZTN (competition authority)

i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. الزراعة عند 15.9% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme إزالة الغابات (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. التصنيع عند 26.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total إزالة الغابات (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The الاعتماد على النظام is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of إزالة الغابات-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: إصلاح agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. عندما hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, المصلحة المتداخلة في continued إزالة الغابات breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme الاعتماد على النظام — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing الاعتماد على النظام.
a: Document إزالة الغابات through community organizations
Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)
Engage international development organizations
International agricultural companies: Support sustainable supply chains from Haiti
الاستثمار في tree crop processing (coffee, cacao, mango)
Charcoal alternatives: Support LPG transition programs
MDE: إنفاذ (to extent possible) remaining forest protections
MARNDR (Agriculture Ministry): Prioritize hillside agroforestry programs
ONEV: Support reforestation monitoring
Support international reforestation and land restoration programs for Haiti
الدعوة من خلال CARICOM for regional بيئي support
الضغط من أجل debt-for-nature swaps to finance reforestation
Support Haitian diaspora organizations working on بيئي restoration
i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most بيئي programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — بيئي monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي ($222.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with strong manufacturing (15.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, automotive-focused). الخدمات عند 59.5% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). الزراعة عند 2.7% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. عندما health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: تعزيز the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax يضعف المصلحة المتداخلة في high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. إصلاحulation targets can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 اقتصاد ($1,396.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and التعدين (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic إزالة الغابات.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-إزالة الغابات traceability to plantation level. عندما لكل محطةation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-إزالة الغابات supply chain traceability. عندما international buyers require verified إزالة الغابات-free palm oil, المصلحة المتداخلة في clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession بيئي data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors إزالة الغابات by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.
a: Report illegal إزالة الغابات to KLHK (Ministry of Environment and Forestry)
Document land rights violations — report to Komnas HAM (National Human Rights Commission)
Report fire-setting to Satgas Karhutla (forest fire task force)

اعتماد RSPO certification across all operations

Support EUDR implementation with adequate transition support for smallholders

i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, بيئي regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest بيئي NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable زيت النخيل) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential ديمقراطية and the world's third-largest ديمقراطية.

IE.s: High-income EU اقتصاد ($609.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, inflated by multinational profit booking). التصنيع عند 29.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. الزراعة عند 1% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي but intensive dairy farming with significant methane انبعاثات. الخدمات عند 60.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane انبعاثات by 20%+. عندما per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب from agricultural production data.
bp: إصلاح CAP subsidies from production-linked to بيئي outcome-linked. عندما dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, المصلحة المتداخلة في herd growth يضعف.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.

Document water pollution from dairy — report to local authority water services
Use Irish Protected Disclosures Act 2014 for protected reporting
Kerry Group, Glanbia, Ornua: Set binding methane reduction targets
الاستثمار في methane-reducing feed technologies
اعتماد Science Based Targets for Irish dairy operations
DAFM: إصلاح agricultural supports toward انبعاثات reduction
EPA: تعزيز agricultural انبعاثات monitoring
Bord Bia: Make Origin Green data independently verifiable

Support stronger EU CAP conditionality on methane

i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's بيئي regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's المُبلّغ protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon تطويرment Act (2021) sets legally binding انبعاثات budgets.

IL.s: High-tech اقتصاد ($540.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with dominant services (72.5% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). High military expenditure (8.78% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field انبعاثات disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net انبعاثات benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. عندما renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the المصلحة المتداخلة يضعف.
Mandatory لكل حقل انبعاثات disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
غير قابل للكسر by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report بيئي violations to the Ministry of Environmental Protection
Document offshore انبعاثات — report through Delek/Chevron compliance channels
الإبلاغ إلى ISA if ESG disclosures are misleading

الاستثمار في regional الطاقة المتجددة integration
اعتماد TCFD-aligned disclosure
Petroleum Commissioner: Require لكل حقل انبعاثات monitoring
Electricity Authority: Accelerate الطاقة المتجددة targets (Israel aims for 30% renewable by 2030)
Ministry of Environmental Protection: تعزيز offshore بيئي standards
تواصل مع member of the Knesset للمطالبة بـ binding الطاقة المتجددة targets and gas انبعاثات disclosure

i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's الهيئة البيئية. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has المُبلّغ protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the مملوكة للدولة gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market إصلاح aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent اقتصاد ($279.6B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. عندما gas capture infrastructure is built, المصلحة المتداخلة في flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking لكل حقل flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report بيئي violations through international operator compliance channels (BP, TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil)
Document gas flaring volumes — satellite data from World Bank GGFR provides independent verification
Report through Iraq EITI channels
BP (Rumaila), TotalEnergies (Halfaya), ExxonMobil (West Qurna): الاستثمار في associated gas capture infrastructure
تنفيذ flare reduction targets
SOMO (State Organization for Marketing of Oil): اعتماد انبعاثات disclosure standards
Ministry of Oil: إنفاذ gas flaring reduction targets in Technical Service Contracts
Ministry of Environment: تعزيز air quality enforcement near oil fields

Support UN Iraq partnership on بيئي governance capacity building
i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for بيئي regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for بيئي policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a برلماني ديمقراطية but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international عقوبات. التصنيع عند 20.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International عقوبات have already weakened the المصلحة المتداخلة by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. عندما عقوبات enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. عندما Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for الطاقة المتجددة investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The المصلحة المتداخلة in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field بيئي data is largely unavailable due to عقوبات-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
غير قابل للكسر. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report بيئي violations to DoE (Department of Environment)
Document air pollution and health impacts — Iran's cities rank among the world's most polluted
Report through international academic and research channels
NIOC: Reduce gas flaring and venting at production facilities
الاستثمار في domestic solar and wind energy development
تنفيذ انبعاثات monitoring for major fields
Ministry of Petroleum: تنفيذ flaring reduction programs
DoE: تعزيز air quality enforcement in Tehran and major cities
Ministry of Energy: Accelerate الطاقة المتجددة development
Support international climate cooperation mechanisms that include Iran
الدعوة من خلال OPEC for managed transition planning
الضغط من أجل بيئي conditionality in any future عقوبات relief negotiations
Support Iranian diaspora بيئي advocacy organizations
i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's الهيئة البيئية, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective المُبلّغ protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for الطاقة المتجددة development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced اقتصاد ($33.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). مصائد الأسماك are 5% of الناتج المحلي الإجمالي and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. عندما ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: إصلاح ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. عندما quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, المصلحة المتداخلة في maximum extraction يضعف.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.
a: Report quota violations to Fiskistofa (Directorate of مصائد الأسماك)
Document bycatch or illegal discarding
Use Iceland's المُبلّغ protections

i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of مصائد الأسماك) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and مصائد الأسماك — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower الشفافية than UK mainland. عندما beneficial ownership data and tax الشفافية information are published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership الشفافية aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. عندما financial secrecy is eliminated, the المصلحة المتداخلة between service providers and opacity-seeking clients يضعف.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to JFIU (Joint Financial Intelligence Unit) in Jersey or FIS (Financial Intelligence Service) in Guernsey
Document regulatory violations — report to JFSC or GFSC
Report through internal bank compliance channels
تنفيذ enhanced beneficial ownership due diligence
اعتماد ESG integration across fund and trust structures
Align with UK الشفافية standards ahead of regulatory mandates
JFSC/GFSC: تعزيز beneficial ownership verification
تنفيذ UK Economic Crime Act-aligned الشفافية
إنفاذ enhanced AML due diligence requirements
Engage through UK Parliament channels — the Crown Dependencies' constitutional relationship means the UK Parliament has ultimate legislative authority
Support OECD Global Forum on Transparency standards
Advocate for Moneyval enhanced evaluation compliance
الضغط من أجل alignment with EU AMLD standards
i: JFSC (Jersey الخدمات المالية Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey الخدمات المالية Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island اقتصاد ($22B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with tourism and services dominant (60% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. عندما soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: إصلاح agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. عندما farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the المصلحة المتداخلة breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects بيئي data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.

i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's الهيئة البيئية. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and مصائد الأسماك — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style برلماني ديمقراطية.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern اقتصاد ($53.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with limited natural resources. الخدمات عند 60.4% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. High military expenditure (4.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash التعدين (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. عندما بيئي cost data is published alongside التعدين revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Internalize بيئي costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into التعدين operations through بيئي levies. عندما miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, المصلحة المتداخلة في water-intensive extraction يضعف.
Publish لكل منجم water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to التعدين output makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.

Support Red Sea-Dead Sea Canal alternatives for Dead Sea stabilization
الدعوة من خلال World Bank for بيئي governance of Dead Sea
الضغط من أجل OECD water governance recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's الهيئة البيئية. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees التعدين policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the التعدين regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a ملكية دستورية with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest اقتصاد ($120.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with agriculture at 22.5% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (tea, coffee, horticulture). الخدمات عند 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. عندما per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: إصلاح agricultural export incentives to require بيئي certification. عندما tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, المصلحة المتداخلة في intensive monoculture يضعف.
Farm-level بيئي data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

الاستثمار في water-efficient irrigation technology
Ministry of Agriculture: إصلاح agricultural incentives toward climate-resilient farming
NEMA: تعزيز بيئي monitoring in intensive horticulture zones

i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's بيئي regulator, responsible for بيئي impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. WRA (Water Resources Authority) — manages water resources allocation and monitoring. PCPB (Pest Control Products Board) — regulates pesticide registration and use.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, مصائد الأسماك and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong بيئي protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous اقتصاد ($17.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) dominated by gold التعدين (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, min=11.15%). الزراعة عند 8.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary ديمقراطية (rare in Central Asia).

sectors.w: Kumtor gold mine (Centerra Gold, now nationalized) operates near glaciers — tailings and cyanide contamination affect water systems. عندما بيئي monitoring data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all التعدين. عندما remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making بيئي costs visible makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.

i: SAEPF — بيئي agency. Kyrgyzaltyn — state gold company that took over Kumtor in 2022.
Kyrgyzaltyn — manages state التعدين interests. EITI Kyrgyz Republic — member since 2004.
State Committee for Industry, Energy and Subsoil Use — التعدين regulator.
Jogorku Kenesh (Supreme Council) — unicameral parliament, 90 members. Kyrgyzstan is Central Asia's most democratic country.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income اقتصاد ($46.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with garment manufacturing (27.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta إزالة الغابات ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes إزالة الغابات computable.
bp: إصلاح economic land concession system to require بيئي compliance. عندما concession holders face revocation for إزالة الغابات, the المصلحة المتداخلة يضعف.
Satellite-based forest monitoring (Global Forest Watch already tracks Cambodia extensively) linked to concession data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. Community-managed forests demonstrate alternative models.
a: Report illegal logging to international monitoring organizations (Global Witness, LICADHO)
Document land grabbing — report through international accountability mechanisms

i: Note: Cambodia under CPP governance severely restricts المجتمع المدني. LICADHO (Cambodian League for the Promotion and Defence of Human Rights) — one of the few remaining domestic human rights organizations. Global Witness has documented illegal logging and land concession abuses.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has بيئي certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and مصائد الأسماك — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

sectors.w: Kuwait's Burgan oil field (world's second-largest) is mature. As production costs rise, the المصلحة المتداخلة يضعف. KIA sovereign wealth provides a diversification mechanism.
bp: KIA investment diversification away from fossil fuels. عندما the sovereign wealth fund's returns from non-oil investments exceed declining oil returns, المصلحة المتداخلة في oil dependence breaks.
Per-field انبعاثات disclosure for KPC operations. Making بيئي costs visible makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: EPA Kuwait (Environment Public Authority) — the بيئي regulator. KPC (Kuwait Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil company managing all upstream and downstream operations. State Audit Bureau — conducts financial oversight.
KPC — manages Kuwait's entire petroleum value chain. KIA (Kuwait Investment Authority) — sovereign wealth fund, one of the world's largest.
Supreme Petroleum Council — the supreme decision-making body for oil policy. CBK (Central Bank of Kuwait) — the financial regulator.
Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a ملكية دستورية with genuine (if limited) برلماني debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest اقتصاد ($291.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Kazakhstan's Kashagan field has suffered repeated delays and بيئي incidents (H₂S — hydrogen sulfide). Environmental monitoring of H₂S انبعاثات and Caspian Sea impact makes W computable from production data.
bp: Redirect National Fund (sovereign wealth) investment toward economic diversification. عندما non-oil sectors grow faster than depleting oil revenue, المصلحة المتداخلة في continued extraction breaks.
Per-field انبعاثات and بيئي monitoring disclosure (particularly H₂S at Kashagan). Making بيئي and health costs visible makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. Hydrocarbon extraction and combustion release CO₂ and H₂S.

i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — الهيئة البيئية. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian بيئي cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian اقتصاد ($16.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with agriculture at 16.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي and التعدين at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's التعدين sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. عندما بيئي monitoring data is published alongside التعدين revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Environmental bonds for التعدين licenses. عندما remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine بيئي data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making بيئي costs visible makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.

Document بيئي impacts through international monitoring organizations

i: MONRE — Laos's environment ministry. Note: Laos is a دولة الحزب الواحد (LPRP). No independent المجتمع المدني or media.
Major operators include MMG (China Minmetals subsidiary), PanAust. Lao government holds equity in major mines.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — oversees التعدين and energy policy. Laos is not yet an EITI member.
Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian تطويرment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed اقتصاد ($20.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the المصلحة المتداخلة has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. عندما accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the المصلحة المتداخلة between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً — the crisis has already revealed الاعتماد على النظام. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.

Report capital flight data to the Special Investigation Commission

i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island اقتصاد ($99B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. الزراعة عند 8.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (tea, rubber, coconut). التصنيع عند 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural الاعتماد على النظام works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). عندما transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, المصلحة المتداخلة في chemical-dependent monoculture يضعف sustainably.
Per-estate بيئي data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of الاعتماد على النظام (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

i: CEA (Central Environmental Authority) — Sri Lanka's بيئي regulator. Registrar of Pesticides — under the Department of Agriculture, regulates pesticide use. Tea Research Institute — conducts research on sustainable tea production.
Major plantation companies: Kelani Valley Plantations, Bogawantalawa Tea Estates. Sri Lanka Tea Board — regulates the tea industry.
Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy. Sri Lanka Tea Board — manages quality standards and exports.

Parliament of Sri Lanka (225 members). Contact through parliament.lk. Sri Lanka is a semi-presidential republic. EU GSP+ — Sri Lanka benefits from preferential trade access contingent on human rights and بيئي governance.

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 63.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. التصنيع عند 14% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). الزراعة عند 2.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي.

bp: EU front-of-pack health labelling implementation.

VLK (Valstybinė ligonių kasa / National Health Insurance Fund) — manages health insurance data.
Seimas (Parliament of Lithuania) — unicameral, 141 members. Contact through lrs.lt.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, highest الناتج المحلي الإجمالي per capita globally). الخدمات عند 81.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

sectors.w: Luxembourg's investment fund industry manages €5T+ in assets. عندما financed انبعاثات and beneficial ownership are disclosed, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full EU SFDR and AMLD implementation. عندما fund-level financed انبعاثات and beneficial ownership are transparent, المصلحة المتداخلة في opaque financial intermediation يضعف.
CSSF mandatory ESG disclosure for all Luxembourg-domiciled funds. Making climate impact visible per fund makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Fund domiciliation can relocate, but Luxembourg's legal infrastructure and EU access create switching costs.

i: CSSF — Luxembourg's financial regulator, supervising banks, investment funds, and other financial entities. CRF (Cellule de Renseignement Financier) — financial intelligence unit.
Luxembourg hosts 3,600+ investment funds. ALFI (Association of the Luxembourg Fund Industry) — the industry association.
CSSF — conducts supervision of the fund industry. BCL (Banque centrale du Luxembourg) — participates in ECB monetary policy and macroprudential supervision.
Chambre des Députés — unicameral parliament, 60 members. Contact through chd.lu. Luxembourg was instrumental in establishing the EU Green Bond Standard and hosts the Luxembourg Green Exchange.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 64.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Forestry significant. الزراعة عند 4% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

bp: EU front-of-pack labelling.

Major companies: Rīgas Piena kombināts, Latvijas Balzams.
NVD (Nacionālais veselības dienests / National Health Service) — manages health insurance.
Saeima — unicameral parliament, 100 members. Contact through saeima.lv.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The المصلحة المتداخلة is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. عندما oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), المصلحة المتداخلة في capturing oil infrastructure يضعف.
NOC لكل حقل production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to بيئي data makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Provide data to international monitoring (UN Panel of Experts on Libya)

i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors عقوبات compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African اقتصاد ($160.6B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with agriculture at 10.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي and growing الطاقة المتجددة sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). التصنيع عند 15.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate التعدين generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. عندما لكل منجم بيئي data is published alongside production revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. عندما OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, المصلحة المتداخلة في low-cost extraction يضعف.
Mandatory لكل منجم بيئي disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable لكل منجم data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى the Secrétariat d'État chargé du Développement Durable
