i: Secrétariat d'État chargé du Développement Durable — oversees بيئي policy. ABH — river basin agencies managing water resources. OCP Group — the مملوكة للدولة phosphate company, one of Morocco's largest employers.

OCP Group (Office Chérifien des Phosphates) — مملوكة للدولة, controls ~30% of global phosphate trade. OCP has invested heavily in sustainability initiatives including the Mohammed VI Polytechnic University.
Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees التعدين and بيئي policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a ملكية دستورية with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest الناتج المحلي الإجمالي per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

sectors.w: Monaco's financial services facilitate wealth management with favorable tax treatment. عندما beneficial ownership and tax الشفافية data are published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Full compliance with OECD Global Forum الشفافية standards and CRS information exchange. عندما opacity is eliminated, the المصلحة المتداخلة يضعف.
Publication of aggregate beneficial ownership and capital flow data. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Financial services can relocate but Monaco's brand and geographic advantages create switching costs.

Monaco hosts branches of major international banks. Association Monégasque des Activités Financières (AMAF) — the financial industry association.
CCAF — Monaco's financial regulator. Monaco is not an عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي but has a customs union with France and cooperates on financial regulation.
Conseil National — Monaco's unicameral parliament, 24 members. Monaco is a ملكية دستورية (Prince Albert II). Moneyval (Council of Europe) evaluates Monaco's AML framework.

MD.s: Small Eastern European اقتصاد ($18.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 7.1% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (wine, agriculture). الخدمات عند 62.3%. مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

sectors.w: Moldova's agricultural sector is dominated by grain monoculture on degraded chernozem soils. عندما soil health data is linked to agricultural output, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EU accession agricultural alignment — CAP-style بيئي conditionality. عندما subsidies reward soil health, المصلحة المتداخلة في exhaustive monoculture يضعف.
Mandatory soil health monitoring per farm. Moldova's fertile chernozem soils are degrading — making this visible makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

Moldova's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders and medium enterprises.
Ministry of Agriculture and Food Industry — oversees agricultural policy.
Parlamentul Republicii Moldova — unicameral, 101 members. Contact through parlament.md. Moldova is an مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot اقتصاد ($17.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 22.5% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating إزالة الغابات (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

sectors.w: Madagascar's slash-and-burn agriculture (tavy) has destroyed 90%+ of original forest. عندما إزالة الغابات data is linked to agricultural output, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. عندما tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, المصلحة المتداخلة في forest clearing breaks.
Satellite إزالة الغابات monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
Extreme الاعتماد على النظام. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

i: MNP (Madagascar National Parks) — manages protected areas. WWF, Conservation International, WCS — major international conservation organizations with Madagascar programs.
QMM (QIT Madagascar Minerals, Rio Tinto subsidiary) — ilmenite التعدين. Ambatovy — nickel and cobalt mine (Sumitomo). Madagascar is the world's largest vanilla producer.
ONE (Office National pour l'Environnement) — the بيئي assessment authority. MEEF (Ministère de l'Environnement et de l'Écologie et des Forêts) — environment ministry.
Assemblée nationale de Madagascar — 151 members. Sénat — 18 members. Madagascar is a semi-presidential republic.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan اقتصاد ($17B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 14.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الخدمات عند 56.2%. مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country. Coal-dependent energy. الزراعة عند 6.1% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي.

sectors.w: North Macedonia's lignite dependence (Bitola power plant) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make coal uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring ETS alignment. Coal becomes uncompetitive at EU carbon prices.
Per-plant انبعاثات and health cost disclosure. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Coal combustion releases pollutants.

i: Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning — الهيئة البيئية. North Macedonia is an Energy Community member.
ESM — state electricity company operating the Bitola lignite plant.
ERC (Energy Regulatory Commission) — منظم الطاقة. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU energy acquis alignment.
Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country.

ML.s: Sahelian اقتصاد ($26.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with gold التعدين (16.18% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) and agriculture (33.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold التعدين generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). عندما بيئي data is published alongside production, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: International supply chain due diligence requiring mine-level بيئي compliance. عندما buyers verify conditions, المصلحة المتداخلة في unregulated extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal التعدين الاعتماد على النظام.

i: DNGM — national geological and التعدين directorate. Note: Mali is under military rule (CNSP). Civil society space is restricted.
Barrick Gold — operates Loulo-Gounkoto complex. B2Gold — operates Fekola mine. Resolute Mining — operates Syama mine. EITI Mali — member since 2006.
Ministry of Mines, Energy and Water — oversees التعدين policy. Mali's 2019 Mining Code establishes بيئي obligations.
Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich اقتصاد ($74.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) under military junta since 2021 coup. ريع الغاز 4.4%. Jade and gem التعدين (est. $31B/year — more than formal الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 20.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. عندما jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: International عقوبات targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. عندما revenue is blocked, the المصلحة المتداخلة between the military and jade التعدين يضعف.
Supply chain الشفافية for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.

Document military revenue flows from jade and gems

OECD: Include jade in conflict mineral due diligence guidance

Support targeted international عقوبات on Myanmar military التعدين revenues

i: Note: Myanmar under the military junta (State Administration Council) has no functioning المجتمع المدني space. Global Witness has published extensive reports on Myanmar's jade industry. Justice for Myanmar — international advocacy organization documenting military business interests.
Myanmar Gems Enterprise — military-controlled entity managing gem auctions. International buyers increasingly apply conflict mineral frameworks to Myanmar sourcing.
International engagement only — domestic regulation under junta is not independent.

Note: Myanmar's elected parliament (Pyidaungsu Hluttaw) was dissolved by the military coup. The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted عقوبات by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked اقتصاد ($23.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Mining at 26.57% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary ديمقراطية — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's التعدين sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. عندما لكل منجم بيئي data is linked to production revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees reflecting true scarcity. عندما التعدين companies pay for water in arid steppe, المصلحة المتداخلة في water-intensive extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.

i: MNET — الهيئة البيئية. EITI Mongolia — member since 2007. Mongolia has relatively active المجتمع المدني for the region.
Oyu Tolgoi — the giant copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto 66%, Government 34%). Erdenes Mongol — state التعدين holding company. Tavan Tolgoi — massive coal deposit.
MRAM — the التعدين regulator. Mongolia's 2006 Minerals Law governs التعدين licensing.
State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a برلماني ديمقراطية with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism اقتصاد ($49.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 83.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. عندما social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. عندما social costs are visible alongside revenues, المصلحة المتداخلة في revenue maximization without harm mitigation يضعف.
DICJ publication of problem gambling prevalence, social cost estimates, and AML compliance data per concessionaire. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

Six gaming concessionaires hold licenses renewed in 2023. Sands China (Las Vegas Sands subsidiary), Galaxy Entertainment, Wynn Macau, MGM China, SJM Holdings, Melco Resorts — operate 40+ casinos.
DICJ — the gaming regulator overseeing all casino operations. 2023 concession renewal included enhanced responsible gambling requirements.
Assembleia Legislativa de Macau — 33 members (14 directly elected, 12 indirectly elected, 7 appointed). Macao is a Special Administrative Region of China with limited autonomy.

MR.s: Sahelian اقتصاد ($10.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with التعدين (iron ore, 9.59% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) and agriculture (19.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). مصائد الأسماك significant. New hydrogen and gas projects (GTA — Greater Tortue Ahmeyim). Coal at 0.67%.

sectors.w: SNIM iron ore التعدين in Zouérat generates dust and water issues. عندما بيئي monitoring is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Environmental bond requirements for التعدين. عندما remediation is pre-funded, المصلحة المتداخلة in unaccountable extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي data disclosure. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining disturbs landscapes but rehabilitation can reduce impact.

SNIM — state iron company. Kinross Gold — operates Tasiast mine. BP and Kosmos Energy — developing the GTA gas field.
EITI Mauritania — member since 2005.
Assemblée nationale de Mauritanie — 176 members. Mauritania is a presidential republic with limited democratic space.

MT.s: Small EU island اقتصاد ($25B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 81.8% (financial services, gaming, tourism). عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي. Major online gambling hub. No significant natural resources.

sectors.w: Malta licenses ~300 online gambling companies (MGA). عندما problem gambling and AML data is published per licensee, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Enhanced MGA licensing requirements with harm data disclosure. Makes المصلحة المتداخلة في revenue without accountability weaker.
Per-licensee problem gambling and AML compliance data publication. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Online gambling creates addiction risk. Harm reduction measures can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: MGA (Malta Gaming Authority) — licenses and regulates online gambling. FIAU — financial intelligence unit. Malta transposed EU Whistleblower Directive.
Malta hosts ~300 licensed gambling companies including Betsson, Kindred, LeoVegas.
MGA — the gambling regulator. MFSA (Malta الخدمات المالية Authority) — the financial regulator.
Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU برلماني ديمقراطية.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island اقتصاد ($14.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 64.4% (financial services, tourism). التصنيع عند 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

sectors.w: Mauritius is a major offshore financial center, particularly for India-bound investment (India-Mauritius tax treaty). عندما beneficial ownership and tax data is transparent, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Full CRS and FATF compliance. عندما financial opacity is eliminated, the المصلحة المتداخلة يضعف.
Publication of beneficial ownership data. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Financial services can relocate but Mauritius's India tax treaty and infrastructure create switching costs.

i: FSC — the integrated financial services regulator. FIU — financial intelligence unit.
Mauritius hosts ~900 Global Business companies (Category 1 and 2). Major banks: SBM Holdings, MCB Group.
FSC — regulates the Global Business sector. Bank of Mauritius — the central bank. Mauritius was on the FATF grey list (2020-2021) and implemented reforms.
National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a برلماني ديمقراطية with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income اقتصاد ($11.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 31.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the المصلحة المتداخلة between tobacco growers and buyers يضعف.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. عندما alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, المصلحة المتداخلة في tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of تدهور التربة and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

Document child labor — report to Ministry of Labour
Report through tobacco buyer compliance channels (BAT, JTI)

i: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department) — الهيئة البيئية. Ministry of Labour — enforces child labor laws.
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One International subsidiary) — the largest tobacco buyer. JTI, BAT — international tobacco companies sourcing from Malawi.
Tobacco Commission (now TCC — Tobacco Control Commission) — regulates the tobacco sector. Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water تطويرment.
National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential ديمقراطية. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income اقتصاد ($422.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). التصنيع عند 22.5% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (electronics, automotive). الخدمات عند 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. عندما لكل محطةation بيئي data is linked to trade, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-إزالة الغابات traceability. عندما buyers verify origin, المصلحة المتداخلة في forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Mandatory MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable زيت النخيل) certification with independently verifiable بيئي data per estate. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.

اعتماد zero-إزالة الغابات and no-peat commitments

i: DOE (Jabatan Alam Sekitar / Department of Environment) — الهيئة البيئية. SUHAKAM (Human Rights Commission of Malaysia) — investigates rights complaints including in palm oil sector. RSPO — Malaysia co-hosts the RSPO Secretariat.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian زيت النخيل Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable زيت النخيل) — the national mandatory certification scheme.
Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal ملكية دستورية and برلماني ديمقراطية.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing اقتصاد ($22.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. الزراعة عند 25.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. عندما per-project بيئي and social cost data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and بيئي standards. عندما development is linked to social outcomes, المصلحة المتداخلة في extraction without accountability يضعف.
Per-project بيئي disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.

i: MITADER — environment ministry. INP (Instituto Nacional de Petróleo) — the petroleum regulator. Note: Mozambique has limited المُبلّغ protections. The Cabo Delgado insurgency complicates المجتمع المدني operations in the gas-rich north.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and التعدين policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income اقتصاد ($13.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with التعدين at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). الزراعة عند 7.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium التعدين (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. عندما لكل منجم بيئي monitoring is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium التعدين. عندما miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, المصلحة المتداخلة في water-intensive extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring disclosure. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Uranium التعدين generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate الاعتماد على النظام.

i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong المجتمع المدني for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese مملوكة للدولة). Namibia also has significant diamond التعدين (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees التعدين policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential ديمقراطية with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian اقتصاد ($19.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 34.5% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Uranium التعدين (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium التعدين (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. عندما remediation costs are pre-funded, المصلحة المتداخلة in extraction without accountability يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Uranium التعدين generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate الاعتماد على النظام.

Orano — operates SOMAÏR and COMINAK uranium mines at Arlit (COMINAK closed 2021). Chinese companies (CNNPC) have expanding uranium interests.
Ministry of Mines — oversees التعدين policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American اقتصاد ($19.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 14.4% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. الخدمات عند 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold التعدين generates mercury and cyanide contamination. عندما بيئي data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Supply chain due diligence for gold sourced from Nicaragua.
Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.

i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — الهيئة البيئية. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly سلطوي. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — التعدين regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian اقتصاد ($42.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 21.9% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. عندما per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: إصلاح agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. عندما hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, المصلحة المتداخلة في unsustainable cultivation يضعف.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.

i: DoE — الهيئة البيئية under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock تطويرment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced اقتصاد ($260.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. الزراعة عند 4.4% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي but outsized بيئي footprint (dairy is largest export sector). الخدمات عند 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). عندما per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: تنفيذ the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. عندما farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, المصلحة المتداخلة في herd expansion يضعف.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: الإبلاغ إلى regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: اعتماد binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
تنفيذ methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: إنفاذ NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): إصلاح farm support toward بيئي outcomes
EPA: تعزيز agricultural chemical regulation

i: Regional councils — the primary بيئي regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national بيئي policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong المُبلّغ protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve بيئي bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf اقتصاد ($107.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum تطويرment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. عندما hydrogen revenue streams are established, المصلحة المتداخلة في oil dependence يضعف.
Per-field انبعاثات disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: الإبلاغ إلى Environment Authority
Report through PDO/Shell compliance channels
PDO: Accelerate الطاقة المتجددة integration in operations
OQ (state energy company): تطوير green hydrogen export capacity
تنفيذ TCFD reporting
Ministry of Energy and Minerals: Balance oil production with hydrogen transition
EA: تعزيز بيئي standards
CBO (Central Bank of Oman): Climate risk in financial supervision
Engage through the Majlis al-Shura (advisory, 86 elected members) on energy transition policy
الدعوة من خلال GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support IRENA recommendations on Gulf state transition
الضغط من أجل Oman Vision 2040 بيئي targets enforcement
i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's بيئي regulator. PDO (Petroleum تطويرment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing برلماني activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant اقتصاد ($86.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). الخدمات عند 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá التعدين contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The المصلحة المتداخلة between the التعدين company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of التعدين contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the المصلحة المتداخلة through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing الاعتماد على النظام.
a: Report بيئي violations during mine closure to MiAmbiente (Ministry of Environment)
Document water quality downstream of Cobre Panamá
Report through First Quantum compliance channels
First Quantum: Cooperate with orderly mine closure and بيئي remediation
Ensure worker transition support
Comply with Supreme Court ruling
MiAmbiente: Ensure comprehensive بيئي remediation
Ministry of Commerce: Support economic transition for affected communities
Comptroller General: Audit التعدين revenue management
تواصل مع Diputado in the Asamblea Nacional (71 members) للمطالبة بـ comprehensive mine closure and remediation legislation
Support the Cobre Panamá precedent as a model for democratic resource governance
Advocate for investment treaty reform to protect sovereign بيئي decisions
الضغط من أجل ICSID (World Bank arbitration) reform on بيئي sovereignty
i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — الهيئة البيئية. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the التعدين contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees التعدين concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich اقتصاد ($289.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with التعدين at 12.1% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). الزراعة عند 7.3%. الخدمات عند 51.3%. Social conflicts around التعدين are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's التعدين sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). عندما بيئي monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. عندما indigenous communities can effectively negotiate بيئي conditions, المصلحة المتداخلة في extraction without consent يضعف.
Mandatory لكل منجم بيئي monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's التعدين بيئي standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: الإبلاغ إلى OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through التعدين company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: تنفيذ community development agreements
اعتماد international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish لكل منجم بيئي data
OEFA: Increase بيئي monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: تعزيز بيئي conditions in التعدين concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): إنفاذ water quality standards downstream of mines
تواصل مع Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) للمطالبة بـ enforcement of consulta previa and بيئي monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
الضغط من أجل EITI enhanced reporting with بيئي data
i: OEFA — Peru's بيئي enforcement agency for the التعدين sector, conducting inspections and imposing عقوبات. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts بيئي impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and التعدين ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island اقتصاد ($31.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Mining at 14.41% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). الزراعة عند 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's التعدين sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic بيئي damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory بيئي bonds per IFC Performance Standards. عندما remediation is pre-funded, المصلحة المتداخلة in low-cost disposal يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups
Report through Barrick Gold/Newcrest compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Porgera), Newmont (Lihir), Ok Tedi Mining: تنفيذ international بيئي standards
Address legacy contamination
اعتماد EITI enhanced reporting
MRA (Mineral Resources Authority): تعزيز بيئي conditions in التعدين leases
CEPA: إنفاذ بيئي standards
EITI PNG: Expand to بيئي data
تواصل مع member of the National Parliament (111 members) للمطالبة بـ بيئي bonds for all التعدين operations
Support customary landowner rights in التعدين negotiations
الدعوة من خلال Pacific Islands Forum for regional بيئي standards
الضغط من أجل international accountability for التعدين legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's الهيئة البيئية. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — التعدين regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the التعدين regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a ملكية دستورية (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style برلماني ديمقراطية.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian اقتصاد ($461.6B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 63.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الزراعة عند 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). التصنيع عند 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel التعدين (for EV batteries) generates significant بيئي damage on small islands. عندما لكل منجم بيئي data is linked to nickel exports, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for التعدين permits. President Duterte's 2017 التعدين audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks المصلحة المتداخلة في non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: الإبلاغ إلى DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through المجتمع المدني organizations
الإبلاغ إلى Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: تنفيذ international بيئي standards
اعتماد responsible التعدين certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: تعزيز بيئي monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require بيئي bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): إنفاذ pollution standards
تواصل مع Representative in the House of Representatives (316 members) or Senator للمطالبة بـ enforcement of التعدين بيئي standards
Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced بيئي protections
الدعوة من خلال ASEAN for regional التعدين standards
الضغط من أجل EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages التعدين regulation. Philippines has relatively active المجتمع المدني and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs التعدين operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential ديمقراطية.

PK.s: Large اقتصاد ($371.6B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with agriculture at 23.7% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). التصنيع عند 13.2%. الخدمات عند 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. عندما per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: إصلاح agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. عندما farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, المصلحة المتداخلة في water-intensive monoculture يضعف.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى Pakistan EPA (Environment Protection Agency)
Document water contamination — report to WAPDA (Water and Power تطويرment Authority)
Report through provincial agricultural extension services
Agricultural input companies: تطوير water-efficient farming solutions
Textile companies (reliant on Pakistani cotton): Support sustainable cotton initiatives
الاستثمار في drip irrigation technology
Ministry of National Food Security: إصلاح water pricing for agriculture
IRSA (Indus River System Authority): إنفاذ provincial water allocations
Provincial agriculture departments: Support crop diversification
تواصل مع MNA (Member of National Assembly, 342 members) or Senator للمطالبة بـ agricultural water pricing reform
Leverage Pakistan's Climate Vulnerable Forum membership to advocate for agricultural adaptation finance
Support Indus Waters Treaty modernization for climate adaptation
الضغط من أجل international climate loss and damage finance (Pakistan's 2022 floods were a catalyzing case)
i: Pakistan EPA — federal الهيئة البيئية. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own بيئي agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal برلماني ديمقراطية.

PL.s: Major EU اقتصاد ($917.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). التصنيع عند 16.1% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الخدمات عند 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. عندما full carbon costs are internalized, the المصلحة المتداخلة between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The المصلحة المتداخلة breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant انبعاثات and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.

PGE, Tauron, Enea, PGG: تطوير coal phase-out plans with worker transition
الاستثمار في offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)
اعتماد per-unit انبعاثات reporting
URE (Energy Regulatory Office): إصلاح tariffs to reflect carbon costs
Ministry of Climate: تنفيذ National Energy Policy 2040
NFEP (National Fund for Environmental Protection): Finance mine closure and remediation
تواصل مع Poseł or Senator in the Sejm/Senat للمطالبة بـ accelerated coal phase-out with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support
الضغط من أجل territorial just transition plans with concrete retraining programs
i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief بيئي inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal التعدين company (مملوكة للدولة, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the منظم الطاقة. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the بيئي fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with التعدين unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — among world's highest pharma concentration). الخدمات عند 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). عندما diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: إصلاح food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. عندما imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, المصلحة المتداخلة في high-margin processed imports يضعف.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: الإبلاغ إلى FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal المُبلّغ protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development
اعتماد voluntary front-of-pack labelling
PR Department of Agriculture: Expand local food production programs
Department of Health: تنفيذ nutrition education and labelling requirements
FDA: Apply US food labelling regulations
Contact Puerto Rico's Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives to advocate for food access and local agriculture funding
Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
الضغط من أجل local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal المُبلّغ protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, severely constrained by occupation). الزراعة عند 7.4% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الخدمات عند 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). عندما water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. عندما Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, المصلحة المتداخلة في restricting agricultural development يضعف.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme الاعتماد على النظام. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
الإبلاغ إلى international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
الاستثمار في water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document بيئي impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
الدعوة من خلال UN for equitable water allocation
الضغط من أجل World Bank monitoring of economic impact of water restrictions on Palestinian agriculture
Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian الهيئة البيئية. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU اقتصاد ($313.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 66.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الزراعة عند 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). التصنيع عند 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: تنفيذ EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
Not fully breakable. إصلاحulation mandates reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese المُبلّغ law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: إصلاحulate products
اعتماد front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): تنفيذ labelling
ASAE: إنفاذ marketing standards
