تواصل مع Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) للمطالبة بـ health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's المُبلّغ protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a برلماني ديمقراطية.

PY.s: Landlocked South American اقتصاد ($44.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 10.7% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). التصنيع عند 19% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الخدمات عند 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe إزالة الغابات from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco إزالة الغابات. عندما per-farm إزالة الغابات and تدهور التربة data is linked to soy exports, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-إزالة الغابات soy. عندما EU buyers require verified إزالة الغابات-free origin, المصلحة المتداخلة في Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based إزالة الغابات monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce تدهور التربة.
a: Report illegal إزالة الغابات to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): تنفيذ zero-إزالة الغابات soy sourcing for Paraguay
اعتماد Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
الاستثمار في yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: إنفاذ the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate بيئي standards into soy export certification
INFONA: تعزيز forest monitoring and enforcement
تواصل مع Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional للمطالبة بـ extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur بيئي provisions enforcement
الضغط من أجل indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where إزالة الغابات continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated اقتصاد ($219.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الصناعة عند 58.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. ريع النفط 15.28% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, gas rents 12.01% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — world's largest LNG exporter. الخدمات عند 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ انبعاثات globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. عندما importers reduce LNG dependence, the المصلحة المتداخلة يضعف.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, المصلحة المتداخلة في fossil gas dependence يضعف.
Per-field انبعاثات and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle انبعاثات.
a: الإبلاغ إلى QatarEnergy HSE division
التوثيق من خلال international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
الإبلاغ إلى Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
الاستثمار في blue and green hydrogen
Reduce routine flaring to zero
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change: إنفاذ air quality standards around Ras Laffan
KAHRAMAA (Qatar General Electricity & Water Corporation): Mandate energy efficiency
Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate انبعاثات reduction targets
الدعوة من خلال GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional انبعاثات standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
الضغط من أجل LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on انبعاثات intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — مملوكة للدولة, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — بيئي regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي اقتصاد ($382.6B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 13.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. ريع الغاز 0.53%, oil 0.38%. الخدمات عند 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite عضو الاتحاد الأوروبيship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. عندما soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. عندما subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, المصلحة المتداخلة في exhaustive monoculture يضعف.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: Report illegal logging to Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură
الإبلاغ إلى Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
التوثيق من خلال Agent Green or EuroNatur
Large agricultural companies: تنفيذ EU eco-schemes
Holzindustrie Schweighofer (now HS Timber): اعتماد certified sustainable sourcing
Agricultural associations: اعتماد soil health targets
APIA: Condition CAP payments on eco-scheme compliance
Ministry of Environment: تعزيز Forest Code enforcement
ANPM (National Environmental Protection Agency): Expand monitoring
تواصل مع Deputat in the Camera Deputaților (330 members) or Senator in the Senat (136 members) للمطالبة بـ Forest Code enforcement
Submit EU Pilot complaints on illegal logging through European Commission
Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
الدعوة من خلال European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian بيئي NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — بيئي protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan اقتصاد ($90.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 12.7%. ريع الفحم 0.24% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant انبعاثات and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: الإبلاغ إلى Ministry of Environmental Protection
التوثيق من خلال CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable تطويرment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): تطوير lignite phase-out roadmap
الاستثمار في solar and wind capacity
Plan just transition for Kolubara التعدين basin communities
AERS (Energy Agency): إصلاح tariffs to reflect بيئي costs
Ministry of Mining and Energy: اعتماد Energy Community Decarbonization Roadmap
Energy Community Secretariat: إنفاذ compliance
تواصل مع Narodni poslanik in the Narodna skupština (250 members) للمطالبة بـ a coal phase-out timeline
Support EU accession بيئي chapter benchmarks
الدعوة من خلال Energy Community for binding decarbonization targets
الضغط من أجل EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — الهيئة البيئية. CEKOR — Serbian بيئي NGO. RES Foundation — الطاقة المتجددة advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara التعدين basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — منظم الطاقة. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon اقتصاد ($2,173.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). ريع النفط 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, التعدين 2.05% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. الإنفاق العسكري 7.05% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Authoritarian governance under international عقوبات since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western عقوبات and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the المصلحة المتداخلة.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. عندما importers eliminate dependence, المصلحة المتداخلة في Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced الشفافية — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
غير قابل للكسر. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to عقوبات enforcement authorities
التوثيق من خلال investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: إنفاذ عقوبات compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: تعزيز enforcement against evasion
EU: Close عقوبات loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international عقوبات on Russian fossil fuel revenues
Advocate for G7 price cap enforcement strengthening
الضغط من أجل addressing Russia's shadow fleet بيئي risks in Arctic and Baltic
Support EU energy diversification to permanently reduce Russian gas dependence
i: Note: Russia's domestic المجتمع المدني is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian بيئي issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU عقوبات packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — عقوبات enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international عقوبات coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African اقتصاد ($14.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 24.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. ريع الغابات 3.97%. الخدمات عند 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but سلطوي governance. Strong بيئي policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and تدهور التربة. عندما soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the المصلحة المتداخلة.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
التوثيق من خلال RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources تطويرment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: اعتماد terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export تطويرment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards
MINAGRI (Ministry of Agriculture): Expand terracing programs to all cultivated slopes
REMA: إنفاذ hillside protection zones
RLMUA (Rwanda Land Management and Use Authority): Integrate erosion data into land management
Engage through available برلماني channels — note that Rwanda's legislature has limited independence from the executive
Support Great Lakes بيئي cooperation through ICGLR (International Conference on the Great Lakes Region)
Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union بيئي governance frameworks
i: REMA — the بيئي management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes بيئي sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected اقتصاد ($49.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 22.2% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Mining 6.63% (gold). ريع النفط 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold التعدين uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. عندما gold revenue flows are traced, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. عندما refiners verify provenance, the المصلحة المتداخلة between armed groups and gold revenues يضعف.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Artisanal التعدين uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
التوثيق من خلال INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: تنفيذ enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International عقوبات bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council عقوبات on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
الضغط من أجل UAE cooperation on gold trade الشفافية
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal التعدين
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors عقوبات and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal التعدين and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on تطويرment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic اقتصاد ($603.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 13% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Mining 1% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). الخدمات عند 66.4%. Strong بيئي regulations. عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore التعدين (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. عندما لكل منجم بيئي and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and بيئي remediation. عندما LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, المصلحة المتداخلة في low-cost extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

قابل للكسر جزئياً. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that التعدين's downstream الاعتماد على النظام on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: الإبلاغ إلى Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
الإبلاغ إلى Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
التوثيق من خلال Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: تنفيذ enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: تعزيز بيئي conditions in التعدين permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous بيئي review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into التعدين assessments
تواصل مع Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) للمطالبة بـ indigenous consent requirements in التعدين permits
الدعوة من خلال EU Critical Raw Materials Act for بيئي and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
الضغط من أجل EU taxonomy alignment of التعدين بيئي standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — بيئي protection agency. Bergsstaten — the التعدين inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.

LKAB — مملوكة للدولة iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals التعدين and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized بيئي courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs التعدين permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a ملكية دستورية and عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي.

SG.s: Advanced city-state اقتصاد ($547.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 73% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. التصنيع عند 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' عندما refinery انبعاثات and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's ضريبة الكربون rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). عندما refining margins incorporate carbon costs, المصلحة المتداخلة في unpriced انبعاثات يضعف.
Per-refinery انبعاثات and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce الاعتماد على النظام over time.
a: الإبلاغ إلى NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS المُبلّغ channels for financial misconduct
التوثيق من خلال SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): تنفيذ carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: الاستثمار في green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate ضريبة الكربون escalation timeline
MAS: تعزيز climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate الطاقة المتجددة targets
Engage through available برلماني channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN بيئي cooperation frameworks
الدعوة من خلال Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
الضغط من أجل IMO shipping انبعاثات standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — بيئي regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — منظم الطاقة. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a برلماني republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي اقتصاد ($73B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 19.4% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الخدمات عند 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong بيئي awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. عندما soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. عندما subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, المصلحة المتداخلة في exhaustive monoculture يضعف.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural تطويرment). يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.

قابل للكسر جزئياً. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: الإبلاغ إلى ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)
الإبلاغ إلى Inšpektorat za kmetijstvo (Agricultural Inspectorate)
التوثيق من خلال Slovenian بيئي organizations (Focus, Umanotera)
Agricultural cooperatives: اعتماد organic and integrated farming practices
Dairy industry: تنفيذ manure management standards
Food processors: Source from diversified farming operations
Ministry of Agriculture: تعزيز CAP eco-scheme implementation
ARSO: إنفاذ nitrate directive compliance
ARSKTRP: Condition payments on biodiversity measures
تواصل مع Poslanec in the Državni zbor (90 members) للمطالبة بـ stronger CAP eco-scheme implementation
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
الدعوة من خلال Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable تطويرment. Focus — بيئي NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي ($140.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 16.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). الخدمات عند 60%. عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. عندما per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). عندما consumers can identify ultra-processing, المصلحة المتداخلة في opaque ingredient lists يضعف.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.
a: الإبلاغ إلى ŠVPS (Štátna veterinárna a potravinová správa — State Veterinary and Food Administration)
الإبلاغ إلى ÚVZ SR (Úrad verejného zdravotníctva — Public Health Authority)
التوثيق من خلال consumer protection organizations
Food processors: إصلاحulate to reduce ultra-processing
Retailers (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco): اعتماد front-of-pack labeling
Advertisers: Restrict UPF marketing to children
Ministry of Health: تنفيذ front-of-pack nutrition labeling
ŠVPS: تعزيز food composition standards
Ministry of Agriculture: Support local food production incentives
تواصل مع Poslanec in the Národná rada (150 members) للمطالبة بـ mandatory front-of-pack labeling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy UPF reduction targets
الدعوة من خلال WHO Europe for ultra-processed food regulation
i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural تطويرment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. عضو الاتحاد الأوروبي since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African اقتصاد ($32.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 16.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). مصائد الأسماك crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe الصيد الجائر by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. عندما per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: إصلاح fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. عندما EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, المصلحة المتداخلة في الصيد الجائر يضعف.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)
التوثيق من خلال ICSF (International Collective in Support of Fishworkers)
Report IUU (Illegal, Unreported, Unregulated) fishing to CNSP (Centre National de Surveillance des Pêches)
Foreign fishing companies: Comply with Senegalese fishing access terms
Fish processing companies: اعتماد sustainable sourcing certification (MSC)
Artisanal fishing cooperatives: Support co-management of nearshore zones
Ministry of مصائد الأسماك: إصلاح fishing access agreements with EU and China
CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional مصائد الأسماك Commission): Coordinate regional management
تواصل مع Député in the Assemblée nationale (165 members) للمطالبة بـ reform of foreign fishing access agreements
Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans
الدعوة من خلال AU-IBAR for African fisheries sovereignty
الضغط من أجل RFMO (Regional مصائد الأسماك Management Organization) quotas reflecting stock sustainability
i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of مصائد الأسماك and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Limited economic data available. ريع الغابات 11.24% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (charcoal — major إزالة الغابات driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. عندما charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to إزالة الغابات data, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). عندما the ban is effectively enforced, the المصلحة المتداخلة between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade يضعف.
Satellite إزالة الغابات monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: الإبلاغ إلى UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
التوثيق من خلال Somali بيئي organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes
Gulf state importers (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman): إنفاذ import bans on Somali charcoal
Alternative energy providers: الاستثمار في LPG distribution as charcoal substitute
Federal Government of Somalia: إنفاذ charcoal export ban
Gulf state customs: Screen for Somali charcoal imports
UN SEMG: تعزيز monitoring of charcoal trade networks
Support UN Security Council charcoal ban enforcement
Advocate for Gulf state cooperation on import screening
الضغط من أجل alternative livelihoods funding through UN Somalia programs
Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute بيئي programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors عقوبات including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN عقوبات framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American اقتصاد ($35.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الخدمات عند 61% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الزراعة عند 4.4%. التصنيع عند 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. عندما CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. عندما sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, المصلحة المتداخلة في unregulated pesticide/herbicide use يضعف.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
الإبلاغ إلى MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): تنفيذ worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
اعتماد mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
الاستثمار في worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
الدعوة من خلال PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
الضغط من أجل ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — بيئي regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated اقتصاد ($23.6B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 43.1% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — unusually high due to industrial collapse. ريع النفط 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). عندما oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. عندما reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, المصلحة المتداخلة في opaque extraction يضعف.
Oil revenue flow الشفافية as condition of reconstruction assistance and عقوبات relief. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in بيئي standards.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document بيئي damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: اعتماد بيئي standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on بيئي and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
الدعوة من خلال UN-led political process for resource revenue الشفافية
الضغط من أجل بيئي damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian اقتصاد ($19.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). ريع النفط 16.75% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الزراعة عند 37.7%. ريع الغابات 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue الشفافية mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. عندما oil revenue allocation is made transparent, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Restore oil revenue الشفافية mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks المصلحة المتداخلة في opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
التوثيق من خلال international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
الإبلاغ إلى international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): تنفيذ بيئي and الشفافية standards

Pipeline operators: Publish transport revenue data

الدعوة من خلال African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
الضغط من أجل World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission بيئي programs
i: Note: Chad's المجتمع المدني space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue الشفافية coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African اقتصاد ($10.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 21.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). الخدمات عند 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate التعدين (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. عندما لكل منجم بيئي data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. عندما export markets require cadmium limits, المصلحة المتداخلة في unprocessed phosphate extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: الإبلاغ إلى ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
التوثيق من خلال community organizations in phosphate التعدين regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: الاستثمار في cadmium removal technology
تنفيذ mine rehabilitation for exhausted areas
اعتماد international بيئي reporting standards
