ANGE: إنفاذ بيئي impact assessment requirements
ITIE-Togo: Expand to بيئي data disclosure
Engage through available برلماني channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS بيئي governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
الضغط من أجل EITI full membership with بيئي disclosure
i: ANGE — national بيئي management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — التعدين oversight. ANGE — بيئي assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to برلماني system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian اقتصاد ($526.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 24.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (automotive, electronics, food processing). الزراعة عند 8.7%. الخدمات عند 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). عندما per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators يضعف المصلحة المتداخلة في opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.
a: الإبلاغ إلى Thai FDA (Food and Drug Administration)
التوثيق من خلال Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth)
Report misleading health claims to OCPB (Office of the Consumer Protection Board)
CP Group (Charoen Pokphand): إصلاحulate products to reduce ultra-processing
Thai Union: اعتماد transparent nutritional labeling
Retailers: Promote shelf placement for whole foods
Thai FDA: Extend labeling to cover ultra-processing indicators
Ministry of Public Health: تعزيز sugar tax and UPF marketing restrictions
ThaiHealth: Fund UPF health impact research
تواصل مع สมาชิกสภาผู้แทนราษฎร (Member of the House of Representatives, 500 members) للمطالبة بـ UPF labeling reform
Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
الدعوة من خلال WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
الضغط من أجل Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a ملكية دستورية. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian اقتصاد ($14.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Mining 7.09% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (gold, silver, antimony). الزراعة عند 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of الناتج المحلي الإجمالي from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's التعدين sector includes artisanal gold التعدين with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). عندما per-facility انبعاثات and بيئي data are published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. عندما aluminum and gold buyers require بيئي compliance verification, المصلحة المتداخلة في unregulated production يضعف.
Per-facility بيئي monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride انبعاثات and gold التعدين mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. TALCO smelter انبعاثات can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
التوثيق من خلال Central Asian بيئي networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)
TALCO (Tajik Aluminum Company): الاستثمار في انبعاثات reduction technology
Gold التعدين companies: اعتماد mercury-free processing
International buyers: Require بيئي compliance in supply contracts
Committee for Environmental Protection: تعزيز بيئي enforcement
Ministry of Industry: Require TALCO انبعاثات modernization
EITI Tajikistan: Expand to بيئي data
Support international pressure for بيئي standards in Tajik التعدين through EBRD and IFC project conditionality
الدعوة من خلال OSCE بيئي dimension for monitoring support
الضغط من أجل Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal التعدين
Support EITI candidacy advancement with بيئي disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for بيئي reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik التعدين.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold التعدين includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — بيئي regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively دولة الحزب الواحد (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed اقتصاد ($51.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 18% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. One of the world's most سلطوي states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. عندما methane data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. عندما buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, المصلحة المتداخلة في unmonitored gas production يضعف.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). يجعل W قابلاً للحساب without government cooperation.
غير قابل للكسر. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic المجتمع المدني exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
التوثيق من خلال Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle انبعاثات
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
الدعوة من خلال UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
الضغط من أجل methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent المجتمع المدني, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting بيئي issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an سلطوي state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African اقتصاد ($51.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 9.7% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. ريع النفط 1.55%. التصنيع عند 14.8%. الخدمات عند 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack الشفافية. عندما لكل حقل بيئي and revenue data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue الشفافية. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to الناتج المحلي الإجمالي but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks المصلحة المتداخلة في opaque revenue management.
Per-field بيئي monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: الإبلاغ إلى ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
التوثيق من خلال Tunisian بيئي organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): اعتماد revenue الشفافية standards
الاستثمار في solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: تنفيذ hydrocarbon revenue الشفافية
ANPE: تعزيز بيئي monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate الطاقة المتجددة targets
Engage through available برلماني channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
الدعوة من خلال Union for the Mediterranean for الطاقة المتجددة investment
الضغط من أجل EITI membership as governance الشفافية measure
i: ANPE — بيئي protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on بيئي justice. Tunisia has relatively active المجتمع المدني despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and الطاقة المتجددة agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income اقتصاد ($1,359.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 16.8% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الخدمات عند 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. الزراعة عند 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. عندما coal plant health costs are internalized, المصلحة المتداخلة في cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. عندما coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant انبعاثات and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: الإبلاغ إلى ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
التوثيق من خلال TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)
Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office
EÜAŞ (Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.): تطوير coal phase-out timeline
Private coal operators: الاستثمار في renewable alternatives
Industrial companies: Switch to renewable electricity procurement
EPDK (Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu — Energy Market Regulatory Authority): إصلاح tariffs to reflect بيئي costs
ÇŞB: تنفيذ emission standards aligned with EU IED
EMRA: Support الطاقة المتجددة investment framework
تواصل مع Milletvekili in the Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi (600 members) للمطالبة بـ coal phase-out timeline and health cost accounting
الدعوة من خلال G20 for coal phase-out commitments
الضغط من أجل EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework بيئي standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish بيئي NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy اقتصاد ($25.6B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). ريع الغاز 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). التصنيع عند 14.4%. الخدمات عند 59.2%. Parliamentary ديمقراطية.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, المصلحة المتداخلة في fossil fuel dependence يضعف naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. عندما production costs rise on mature fields, المصلحة المتداخلة في fossil fuel dependence يضعف as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility انبعاثات and بيئي monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: الإبلاغ إلى EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
الإبلاغ إلى MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
التوثيق من خلال Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (بيئي NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): تطوير gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: تنفيذ carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process انبعاثات
EMA: تعزيز air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: تطوير الطاقة المتجددة framework
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission): إصلاح energy pricing
تواصل مع Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (41 members) للمطالبة بـ economic diversification and الطاقة المتجددة policy
Support CARICOM energy transition framework
الدعوة من خلال Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
الضغط من أجل IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active بيئي NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary ديمقراطية with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African اقتصاد ($78.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 23.3% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). ريع الغابات 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). الخدمات عند 29.6%. Growing اقتصاد with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold التعدين (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). عندما لكل منجم بيئي data is published alongside revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and الشفافية requirements. عندما enforced alongside بيئي monitoring, المصلحة المتداخلة في opaque extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mercury-free artisanal التعدين and improved tailings management reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى NEMC (National Environment Management Council)
الإبلاغ إلى Mining Commission
التوثيق من خلال LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)
Twiga Minerals (Barrick/Government JV): تنفيذ international بيئي standards
AngloGold Ashanti (Geita Gold Mine): اعتماد enhanced tailings management
Tanzanite One: Publish بيئي and community impact data
Mining Commission: إنفاذ بيئي conditions in التعدين licenses
NEMC: تعزيز بيئي impact assessment requirements
TEITI: Expand to include بيئي data
تواصل مع Mbunge in the Bunge la Tanzania (393 members) للمطالبة بـ بيئي enforcement in التعدين
Support EITI enhanced reporting with بيئي data
الدعوة من خلال EAC for regional التعدين بيئي standards
الضغط من أجل Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal التعدين
i: NEMC — الهيئة البيئية. Mining Commission — التعدين sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian بيئي law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue الشفافية advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government التعدين entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected اقتصاد ($190.7B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Mining 5.32% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الإنفاق العسكري 34.48% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (wartime). الزراعة عند 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive بيئي damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's التعدين sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive بيئي damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent بيئي standards. عندما reconstruction بيئي data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring بيئي standards in post-war reconstruction. عندما reconstruction adheres to EU بيئي acquis, المصلحة المتداخلة في rapid but dirty rebuilding يضعف.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.
a: الإبلاغ إلى Derzhekoinspektsiia (State Environmental Inspectorate)
التوثيق من خلال OSCE بيئي monitoring
Report war-related بيئي damage through Ukraine's Ecodozor platform
Metinvest (Akhmetov): تنفيذ EU-aligned بيئي standards in reconstruction
ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih: Apply global بيئي standards
Reconstruction companies: اعتماد green building and بيئي remediation standards
Ministry of Environmental Protection: إنفاذ بيئي standards in reconstruction
State Subsoil Service: إصلاح التعدين licensing with بيئي conditions
EU pre-accession assistance: Support بيئي governance capacity building
تواصل مع Narodnyi deputat in the Verkhovna Rada (450 members) للمطالبة بـ بيئي standards in reconstruction legislation
Support Ukraine Recovery Conference بيئي commitments
الدعوة من خلال EU accession process for بيئي chapter prioritization
الضغط من أجل international بيئي damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related بيئي destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related بيئي damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and التعدين group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — التعدين licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires بيئي acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (بيئي damage documentation).

UG.s: East African اقتصاد ($53.9B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 24.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. ريع الغابات 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. عندما project-level بيئي data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. عندما banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, المصلحة المتداخلة في unscrutinized pipeline construction يضعف. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project بيئي impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create بيئي risk.
a: الإبلاغ إلى NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
التوثيق من خلال international بيئي organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels
TotalEnergies: تنفيذ comprehensive biodiversity offsets for Tilenga (inside Murchison Falls NP)
CNOOC Uganda: اعتماد international بيئي standards for Kingfisher
Banks: Apply Equator Principles to EACOP financing decisions
PAU (Petroleum Authority of Uganda): إنفاذ بيئي conditions in production licenses
NEMA: تعزيز بيئي monitoring of oil projects
MEMD (Ministry of Energy and Mineral تطويرment): Ensure transparent revenue management
Support international ESG pressure on EACOP project financing
الدعوة من خلال European Parliament for TotalEnergies duty of vigilance enforcement (French Loi de Vigilance)
الضغط من أجل EITI membership with بيئي disclosure
Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary بيئي issues
i: NEMA — الهيئة البيئية. Note: Ugandan بيئي activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American اقتصاد ($81B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). الزراعة عند 6.4% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الخدمات عند 65.3%. ريع الغابات 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong ديمقراطية — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). عندما soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks المصلحة المتداخلة في soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
الإبلاغ إلى RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
التوثيق من خلال Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: تعزيز soil conservation plan compliance
UPM, Montes del Plata (forestry): Maintain native grassland corridors between eucalyptus plantations
Meat exporters: اعتماد pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): إنفاذ mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: تعزيز بيئي assessment for land-use change
INIA (Instituto Nacional de Investigación Agropecuaria): Publish soil health monitoring data
تواصل مع Diputado in the Cámara de Representantes (99 members) or Senador in the Cámara de Senadores (30 members) للمطالبة بـ enforcement of the Soil Conservation Law
Support Mercosur بيئي cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
الضغط من أجل soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian اقتصاد ($115B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). ريع الغاز 11.04% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). الزراعة عند 18.3%. التصنيع عند 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. عندما لكل حقل production and domestic consumption data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. عندما domestic gas prices reflect market value, المصلحة المتداخلة في underpriced energy يضعف.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.
a: الإبلاغ إلى State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection
Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels
التوثيق من خلال international partner organizations
Uzbekneftegaz: Publish لكل حقل production and بيئي data
Navoi Mining (NMMC): اعتماد international بيئي standards for gold and uranium التعدين
Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure
Ministry of Energy: تنفيذ gas price reform roadmap
Goskomekologiya: تعزيز بيئي enforcement at التعدين and gas facilities
EITI Uzbekistan: Expand to بيئي data disclosure
Engage through Oliy Majlis (parliament) — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (150 members) and Senate (100 members)
Support EITI enhanced reporting with بيئي data
الدعوة من خلال EBRD and ADB for gas price reform conditionality
الضغط من أجل Aral Sea بيئي restoration international cooperation
i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — بيئي regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.
Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold التعدين.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — بيئي regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea بيئي disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent اقتصاد in crisis ($119.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and عقوبات. The المصلحة المتداخلة is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the المصلحة المتداخلة — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue الشفافية is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international عقوبات monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
غير قابل للكسر. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly انبعاثات-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)
التوثيق من خلال exile media and research organizations
Provide data to international عقوبات enforcement authorities
International oil companies with remaining interests (Chevron, Repsol, ENI): Apply بيئي standards to limited operations
Chevron: Publish per-facility بيئي data for Venezuela operations
Service companies: Maintain بيئي standards in contracted work
OFAC: Maintain عقوبات conditionality linked to governance reform
EU: Coordinate عقوبات policy
OPEC: Address Venezuela's production reporting الشفافية
Support international عقوبات conditionality requiring democratic governance and بيئي standards
الدعوة من خلال Lima Group/International Contact Group for governance reform
الضغط من أجل PDVSA operational and بيئي الشفافية as condition of عقوبات relief
Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to المجتمع المدني.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela عقوبات. EU — maintains عقوبات. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing اقتصاد ($476.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 24.4% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. الزراعة عند 11.9%. ريع الفحم 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. ريع الغابات 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the المصلحة المتداخلة away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. عندما JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, المصلحة المتداخلة في coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant انبعاثات and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: الإبلاغ إلى MONRE (Bộ Tài nguyên và Môi trường — Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
التوثيق من خلال VUSTA (Viet Nam Union of Science and Technology Associations)
Report through international development partner channels (World Bank, ADB)
EVN (Electricity of Viet Nam): Accelerate Power تطويرment Plan VIII renewable targets
PVN (PetroVietnam): الاستثمار في offshore wind
International manufacturers (Samsung, Intel): Demand renewable electricity procurement options
MOIT (Ministry of Industry and Trade): تنفيذ PDP VIII renewable targets
MONRE: تعزيز emission standards for coal plants
JETP Secretariat: Accelerate disbursement of transition funding
Support JETP implementation monitoring through international partner coordination
الدعوة من خلال ASEAN for regional energy transition cooperation
الضغط من أجل JETP الشفافية and accountability mechanisms
Support World Bank and ADB الطاقة المتجددة financing for Viet Nam
i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese المجتمع المدني (within party framework). Note: independent المجتمع المدني is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal التعدين company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power تطويرment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets الطاقة المتجددة targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a دولة الحزب الواحد (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan اقتصاد ($11.2B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 12.6%. ريع الفحم 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. الزراعة عند 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. مرشح للاتحاد الأوروبي status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. عندما بيئي compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant انبعاثات and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: الإبلاغ إلى AMMK (Agjencia për Mbrojtjen e Mjedisit të Kosovës — Kosovo Environmental Protection Agency)
التوثيق من خلال INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels
KEK (Korporata Energjetike e Kosovës): Plan Kosovo A decommissioning and Kosovo B modernization or replacement
الاستثمار في solar and wind capacity
تنفيذ just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot التعدين communities
ERO (Energy Regulatory Office): إصلاح tariffs to incentivize renewable investment
MMPH (Ministry of Environment): إنفاذ emission standards
Energy Community Secretariat: Hold Kosovo accountable for compliance
تواصل مع Deputet in the Kuvendi i Kosovës (120 members) للمطالبة بـ Kosovo A decommissioning timeline and الطاقة المتجددة investment
Support EU integration benchmarks on بيئي standards
الدعوة من خلال Energy Community for just transition support
الضغط من أجل World Bank and EBRD financing of الطاقة المتجددة replacement
i: AMMK — بيئي protection agency. INDEP (Institute for تطويرment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, مملوكة للدولة, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — منظم الطاقة. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan اقتصاد ($401.1B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). ريع الفحم 2.44% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). التصنيع عند 12.8%. الخدمات عند 63%. Constitutional ديمقراطية. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. عندما coal plant health costs are internalized, the المصلحة المتداخلة breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. عندما renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, المصلحة المتداخلة في coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant انبعاثات, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate انبعاثات.
a: الإبلاغ إلى DFFE (Department of Forestry, مصائد الأسماك and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
التوثيق من خلال Public Protector complaints
Eskom: تنفيذ coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019
Mining companies (Exxaro, Thungela, Seriti): تطوير coal transition plans
Renewable IPPs: Scale deployment to replace coal capacity
NERSA (National Energy Regulator): إصلاح tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: إنفاذ Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets
تواصل مع Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (400 members) or NCOP (National Council of Provinces, 90 members) للمطالبة بـ Eskom emission standard compliance
Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
الدعوة من خلال BRICS for just energy transition principles
الضغط من أجل climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African بيئي justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest بيئي law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal التعدين. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal التعدين. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.
NERSA — منظم الطاقة. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional ديمقراطية, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African اقتصاد ($25.3B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Mining 28.25% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — one of the highest التعدين dependencies globally (copper). ريع الغابات 6.78%. الخدمات عند 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper التعدين generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). عندما لكل منجم بيئي data is published, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: Mining royalty reform with بيئي earmarking. عندما التعدين revenue is partly allocated to بيئي remediation, المصلحة المتداخلة في externalizing pollution costs يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Copper smelting انبعاثات can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: الإبلاغ إلى ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
التوثيق من خلال community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through التعدين company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): تنفيذ international بيئي standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): اعتماد enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state التعدين holding): Require بيئي compliance from partners
ZEMA: إنفاذ emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: تعزيز بيئي conditions in التعدين licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include بيئي data
تواصل مع Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) للمطالبة بـ بيئي enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with بيئي data
الدعوة من خلال SADC for regional التعدين بيئي standards
الضغط من أجل responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — بيئي management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals تطويرment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African تطويرment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African اقتصاد ($41.5B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). Mining 4.24% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). الزراعة عند 8.7%. التصنيع عند 15.6%. ريع الغابات 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's التعدين sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). عندما لكل منجم بيئي data is published alongside revenue, يصبح W قابلاً للحساب.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). عندما EU buyers require بيئي verification, المصلحة المتداخلة في unregulated extraction يضعف.
Per-mine بيئي monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
قابل للكسر جزئياً. Lithium التعدين (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce الاعتماد على النظام.
a: الإبلاغ إلى EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
التوثيق من خلال ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international التعدين company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): تنفيذ international بيئي standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): اعتماد responsible lithium التعدين practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned بيئي standards
Ministry of Mines: إنفاذ بيئي conditions in التعدين licenses
EMA: تعزيز بيئي impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining تطويرment Corporation): Require بيئي compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available برلماني channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
الدعوة من خلال SADC Mining Protocol for regional بيئي standards
الضغط من أجل EITI membership to improve التعدين الشفافية
i: EMA — بيئي management agency. ZELA — بيئي law organization. Note: المجتمع المدني space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium التعدين (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining تطويرment. EMA — بيئي regulation. ZMDC — state التعدين company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest اقتصاد ($18,743.8B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 24.9% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي — global factory floor. ريع الفحم 0.61%. الصناعة عند 36.5%. الخدمات عند 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more الطاقة المتجددة annually than any other country. عندما renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, المصلحة المتداخلة في coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. عندما existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the المصلحة المتداخلة breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant انبعاثات data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
غير قابل للكسر. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: الإبلاغ إلى MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial بيئي protection bureaus
التوثيق من خلال 12369 بيئي complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
الاستثمار في grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
الدعوة من خلال COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
الضغط من أجل national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central الهيئة البيئية. 12369 hotline — بيئي complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate بيئي data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All مملوكة للدولة, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National تطويرment and إصلاح Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a دولة الحزب الواحد — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced اقتصاد ($1,875.4B الناتج المحلي الإجمالي). التصنيع عند 26.6% الناتج المحلي الإجمالي (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). الخدمات عند 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant ديمقراطية.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. عندما carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the المصلحة المتداخلة breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. عندما carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, المصلحة المتداخلة في coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant انبعاثات and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. يجعل W قابلاً للحساب.
غير قابل للكسر. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: الإبلاغ إلى Ministry of Environment (환경부)
التوثيق من خلال KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): تنفيذ coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: تعزيز K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): إصلاح merit order to disadvantage coal
تواصل مع 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) للمطالبة بـ coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation
Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
الدعوة من خلال OECD for coal finance phase-out
الضغط من أجل G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — الهيئة البيئية. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest بيئي NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national انبعاثات). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
